subject: Exciting opportunity at Stripe — Senior Backend Engineer

subject: Application Received — Senior Full-Stack Developer
snippet: Thank you for applying to the Senior Full-Stack Developer position at Notion. Our team will review your application and get back to you within 5 business days.

subject: Interview Preparation Materials — Anthropic
snippet: As discussed, please find attached the preparation materials for your upcoming interview. The focus will be on system design and Python proficiency.

subject: 5 new job recommendations for you

subject: Thank you for your interest in Figma
snippet: We appreciate your application. Unfortunately, we've decided to move forward with other candidates at this time. We encourage you to apply again in the future.

subject: Career Strategy Session Notes
snippet: Great session today! Here's a summary: 1) Focus on senior-level roles, 2) Improve system design skills, 3) Target companies with strong engineering culture...

subject: Coral Hackathon — Submission Deadline Approaching
snippet: Reminder: The Coral Hackathon submission deadline is May 31st. Make sure your project is ready and all bounty submissions are complete.
